findings.message: httpx added to production dependencies with a lower bound of >=0.27, but the dev group already pins >=0.28. The prod lower bound could allow an older version in production than in development, creating a subtle environment divergence.
findings.suggestion: Align the production lower bound with the dev group: "httpx>=0.28,<1.0" to ensure dev and prod resolve the same minimum version.

findings.message: httpx is a reputable, well-maintained library (Encode/encode) with no known supply-chain concerns. The <1.0 upper cap is a reasonable guard against a future breaking major release. No existing production dependency covers async HTTP client use, so the addition appears justified.
